description_long: This is a compact, modern submachine gun-style rifle with a distinctive blue patterned finish on its upper receiver and handguard, contrasted by black components on the grip, magazine, and stock. The rifle features a short barrel and a prominent top-mounted Picatinny rail for accessory attachment. The stock is a fixed, robust design, providing stability for the user. The magazine is a detachable box type, inserted into the lower receiver just ahead of the pistol grip. Iron sights are present on both the front and rear of the rifle, allowing for precise aiming. The overall build suggests a lightweight, maneuverable weapon suitable for close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact, blue-patterned submachine gun-style rifle with a fixed stock, detachable box magazine, and iron sights, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, front iron sight, and the blue patterned handguard.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the blue patterned receiver, fixed stock, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stock, rear iron sight, and the alignment of the Picatinny rail.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the blue patterned receiver, fixed stock, and magazine release area.
